U ^-11022/12/2012-Tft3II^H«&lMll^ ] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department ofRevenue) (PJTNDPS DIVISION) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd May, 2012 G.S.R. 378(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotics Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988) and in supersession of the Notification dated 18th February, 2010 issued vide G.S.R. 84(E), the Central Government hereby specially empowers Shri Madan Lai Meena, Joint Secretary to the Government of India, for the purpose of the said Section. [F.No.U-11022/12/2012-PITNDPS] NITA GUPTA, Under Secy. 1827 GI/2012 Printed by lhc Manager, <jovernmcnl of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications.
